description: CompositionNavy blue kids sandals made of lightweight, form fitting odour resistant EVAWash care1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washLet your kids leap into summer with these well ventilated pair of navy blue clogs from crocs. The croslite footbed provides ergonomic Fit and comfort and the sandals enhance shock absorption. The ankle strap ensures a snug fit, while the small holes on the uppers can accomodate quite a few jibbitz. The leaf pattern on the outsole ensures superior grip making it a perfect footwear for a day on the beach or for running around in the park.Note: Jibbitz is a company founded by Rich and Sheri Schmelzer in 2005 to create decorative attachments for holes in crocs sandals.
